segments.text: Jesus told them this story to encourage them to pray at all times, and not to become discouraged.
Once there was a judge in this particular town who didn't respect God or care about anyone,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Jesus explained.
In the same town lived a widow who time and again went to the judge, saying, ‘Give me justice in the case against my enemy!’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For a while he didn't want to do anything about it, but eventually he said to himself, ‘Even though I don't respect God or care about anyone,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: this widow is so annoying I'll make sure she receives justice. Then she won't wear me out by her coming to see me so often.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Listen to what even an unjust judge decided,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: said the Lord.
Don't you think that God will make sure his chosen people receive justice, those who cry out to him day and night? Do you think he will make them wait?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: No, I tell you, he will give them justice quickly. However, when the Son of man comes, will he find people on earth who trust in him?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: He also told this story about those who are so sure that they are living right, and who put everybody else down.
Two men went to the Temple to pray. One was a Pharisee, and the other a tax collector.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: The Pharisee stood up and prayed to himself, ‘God, I thank you that I am not like other people—cheats, criminals, [^65] adulterers—or even like this tax collector.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: I fast twice a week, and I pay tithe on my income.’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: But the tax collector stood at a distance. He wouldn't even look up to heaven. Instead he beat his chest and prayed, ‘God, please be merciful to me. I am a sinner.’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: I tell you, it was this man who went home right in God's sight and not the other. For those who exalt themselves will be humbled, while those who humble themselves will be exalted.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Parents were bringing their infants to Jesus to have him bless them by his touch. When the disciples saw what was happening, they tried to stop them.
But Jesus called the children to him. {
Let the little children come to me,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: he said.
Don't prevent them, for the kingdom of God belongs to those who are like them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I tell you the truth, anyone who doesn't welcome the kingdom of God like a little child will never enter it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: One of the rulers came to Jesus and asked him, {
Good Teacher, what do I have to do to inherit eternal life?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Why do you call me good?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus replied.
No one is good, only God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You know the commandments: do not commit adultery, do not murder, do not steal, do not give false testimony, honor your father and mother.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I've kept all these commandments since I was young,
segments.speaker: The man

segments.text: the man replied.
When Jesus heard this he told the man, {
You still lack one thing. Go and sell all you have, give the money to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven. Then come and follow me!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But when the man heard this he became very sad, for he was very wealthy.
When he saw his reaction, Jesus said, {
How difficult it is for the rich to enter the kingdom of God!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: It's easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to enter the kingdom of God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Those who heard this wondered, {
Who can be saved then?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus replied, {
What is impossible in human terms is possible for God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Peter said, {
We left everything to follow you!
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: I tell you the truth,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus told them,
anybody who leaves behind their home, wife, brothers, parents, or children for the sake of God's kingdom
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: will receive so much more in this life, and eternal life in the world to come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus took the twelve disciples aside, and told them, {
We're going to Jerusalem, and all that the prophets wrote about the Son of man will be fulfilled.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He will be handed over to the foreigners, [^67] he will be mocked, insulted, and spat upon.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: They will flog him and kill him, but on the third day he will rise again.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But they didn't understand anything Jesus told them. The meaning was hidden from them and they didn't grasp what he was talking about.
As Jesus approached Jericho a blind man was sitting beside the road begging.
He heard the crowd going past, so he asked what was happening.
They told him, {
Jesus of Nazareth is passing by.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He called out, {
Jesus, son of David, please have mercy on me!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Those at the front of the crowd told him to stop shouting and be quiet, but he only shouted louder, {
Son of David, please have mercy on me!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus stopped and told them to bring the blind man to him. As he came over, Jesus asked him,
What do you want me to do for you?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Lord, please, I want to see,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: he pleaded.
Then see!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus told him.
Your trust in me has healed you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Immediately the man could see. He followed Jesus, praising God. Everyone there who saw what happened also praised God.
